summary: Phase 3 Quick Growth Features Testing - All 4 features verified. SharePortfolio widget (Portfolio page), QR Code Generator, Email Signature Generator (Brand Settings), and 'Powered by KOLOR STUDIO' badge all implemented correctly with proper data-testids.

critical.issue: Prisma MaxClientsInSessionMode error - connection pool exhausted. Backend needs restart periodically. This is an infrastructure issue affecting all API calls.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Prisma database connection pool issue - MaxClientsInSessionMode errors causing intermittent 500s. Consider increasing pool size or implementing connection pooling optimization.
critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 3 features properly implemented with correct data-testids
SharePortfolio component correctly generates QR code using qrcode library
EmailSignatureGenerator properly displays user info and portfolio link
Powered-by badges correctly placed in footer of all 3 client-facing pages

success_rate.backend: API health OK but connection pool issues cause intermittent failures

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Quick Growth Features all verified: 1) SharePortfolio widget on Portfolio page with QR code, copy/email/SMS buttons, 2) EmailSignatureGenerator in Settings > Brand tab, 3) 'Powered by KOLOR STUDIO' badge on PublicPortfolio, ClientPortal, SubmitTestimonial pages. Backend has intermittent Prisma connection pool issues - restart backend if you see 500 errors.
